subject: Urgent: New client pricing model
body: Please review the attached client pricing model. Keep this confidential until we finalize the board memo.

message: We should not share the acquisition target details outside the core team until the announcement. I’m flagging this as restricted.
The revised forecast includes sensitive margin details and is only for the finance leadership group. Do not forward.

subject: Draft NDA terms and client valuation
body: Attached are the NDA terms and the client valuation estimate. This should only be used by your legal review team.

message: FYI: Our Q4 revenue target is $52M and this number should remain internal until after guidance is released.
